pollIntervalHelp: Minimum time between BLUETTI telemetry polls. The first implementation remains read-only.
oauthClientIdHelp: Optional. Leave empty to use BLUETTI's default client ID. Only set this to override the built-in credentials.
oauthClientSecretHelp: Optional. Leave empty to use BLUETTI's default client secret. Stored encrypted/protected by ioBroker when set.
deviceSelectionHelp: Select the device to poll. Requires prior authentication.
